message:
perf: eliminate C FFI for closure variable access (~2.5% CPU improvement)

Rewrite getClosureVar/setClosureVar helpers in pure Zig instead of
calling through C js_frozen_get/set_var_ref_safe. Fix JSVarRef struct
layout to match C (24-byte GC header, not 8-byte). This allows the
compiler to inline ref_count increments and pointer dereferences
directly, eliminating cross-compilation-unit call overhead.
